x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Alert volume and noise ratio affect Now Assist TSOM AI correlation quality. High noise degrades AI grouping accuracy.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){var d=new GlideDateTime();d.addDaysUTC(-30);var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addQuery("sys_created_on",">=",d.getValue());gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.addQuery("state","Closed");gr2.query();var closed=gr2.getRowCount();var tot=new GlideRecord("em_alert");tot.query();var total=tot.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((closed/total)*100):0;return{status:(n<10000&&pct>=50)?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" alerts last 30 days | "+pct+"% closed",finding:"Alert volume: "+n+" in 30 days with "+pct+"% closure rate. "+(n>=10000||pct<50?"High noise environment degrades Now Assist TSOM event correlation accuracy.":"Alert noise ratio acceptable for Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.")};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Tune alert thresholds to reduce false positives. Enable auto-close for self-resolving alerts. Review em_alert_rule_list.do.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc6
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Alert volume and noise ratio affect Now Assist TSOM AI correlation quality. High noise degrades AI grouping accuracy.]]></ai_justification><check_name>Event Management Alert Volume</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){var d=new GlideDateTime();d.addDaysUTC(-30);var gr=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr.addQuery("sys_created_on",">=",d.getValue());gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();var gr2=new GlideRecord("em_alert");gr2.addQuery("state","Closed");gr2.query();var closed=gr2.getRowCount();var tot=new GlideRecord("em_alert");tot.query();var total=tot.getRowCount();var pct=total>0?Math.round((closed/total)*100):0;return{status:(n<10000&&pct>=50)?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" alerts last 30 days | "+pct+"% closed",finding:"Alert volume: "+n+" in 30 days with "+pct+"% closure rate. "+(n>=10000||pct<50?"High noise environment degrades Now Assist TSOM event correlation accuracy.":"Alert noise ratio acceptable for Now Assist TSOM AI correlation.")};})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>AIOPS</module><number>CHK0000447</number><order>50</order><remediation_guidance>Tune alert thresholds to reduce false positives. Enable auto-close for self-resolving alerts. Review em_alert_rule_list.do.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc6</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Event Management Alert Volume</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_87f81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cc6</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
